commands.author: giodl73-repo
commands.review_summary:
Adds the stacked Channel Broker public SDK and bundled channel plugin, including docs, SecretRef metadata, tests, target-prefix ownership handling, and Slack opt-in DM/thread broker routing proof.

PR surface: Source +2226, Tests +1915, Docs +301, Config +78, Generated 0, Other +29. Total +4549 across 51 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows the entrypoint requests `setChannelBrokerRuntime` from `runtime-api.ts`, while that file does not export it and the loader throws on missing named exports. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can add the missing runtime setter export and guard coverage; the broader Channel Broker API/product acceptance remains maintainer-owned.

target.title: Policy: add sandbox posture conformance checks
target.author: giodl73-repo
